tasks.label: Run Through Stage 2 Handoff
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli run-all --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}"; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli run-all --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}"; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli run-all --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}") else (python -m meta_compiler.cli run-all --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}")

tasks.label: Stage 0: Initialize Workspace
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli meta-init --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}" && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 0; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli meta-init --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}" && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 0; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli meta-init --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}" && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 0) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli meta-init --project-name "${input:projectName}" --problem-domain "${input:problemDomain}" --project-type ${input:projectType} --problem-statement-file "${input:problemStatementFile}" && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 0)

tasks.label: Stage 1A: Breadth Research
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli research-breadth && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1a; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli research-breadth && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1a; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli research-breadth && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1a) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli research-breadth && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1a)

tasks.label: Stage 1A: Ingest Prep (all seeds)
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli ingest --scope all; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli ingest --scope all; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli ingest --scope all) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli ingest --scope all)

tasks.label: Stage 1A: Validate Findings
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli ingest-validate; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli ingest-validate; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli ingest-validate) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli ingest-validate)

tasks.label: Stage 1B: Depth Pass
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli research-depth && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1b; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli research-depth && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1b; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli research-depth && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1b) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli research-depth && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1b)

tasks.label: Stage 1C: Review Panel
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli review && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1c; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli review && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1c; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli review && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1c) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli review && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 1c)

tasks.label: Stage 2: Preflight (--start)
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --start; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --start; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --start) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --start)

tasks.detail: Writes workspace-artifacts/runtime/stage2/ brief + transcript skeleton + precheck_request.yaml. Then open .github/prompts/stage-2-dialog.prompt.md in your LLM runtime.

tasks.label: Stage 2: Finalize (--finalize)
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --finalize && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --finalize && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --finalize && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli elicit-vision --finalize && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2)

tasks.detail: Parses decision blocks from transcript.md and compiles decision_log_v{N}.yaml. Run after the Stage 2 dialog is complete.

tasks.label: Stage 2: Audit Requirements
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli audit-requirements; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli audit-requirements; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli audit-requirements) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli audit-requirements)

tasks.label: Stage 3: Scaffold
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli scaffold && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 3; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli scaffold && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 3; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli scaffold && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 3) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli scaffold && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 3)

tasks.label: Stage 4: Execute + Pitch
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli phase4-finalize && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 4; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli phase4-finalize && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 4; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli phase4-finalize && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 4) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli phase4-finalize && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 4)

tasks.label: Wiki Reconcile Concepts (preflight)

tasks.label: Wiki Apply Reconciliation
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-apply-reconciliation; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-apply-reconciliation; fi

tasks.label: Wiki Cross-Source Synthesize (preflight)
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-cross-source-synthesize; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-cross-source-synthesize; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-cross-source-synthesize) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-cross-source-synthesize)

tasks.label: Open Wiki Browser
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-browse; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-browse; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-browse) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli wiki-browse)

tasks.label: Stage 2 Re-entry
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli stage2-reentry --reason "${input:reentryReason}" --sections "${input:reentrySections}"; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli stage2-reentry --reason "${input:reentryReason}" --sections "${input:reentrySections}"; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli stage2-reentry --reason "${input:reentryReason}" --sections "${input:reentrySections}") else (python -m meta_compiler.cli stage2-reentry --reason "${input:reentryReason}" --sections "${input:reentrySections}")

tasks.label: Finalize Re-entry
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli finalize-reentry && .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli finalize-reentry && python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli finalize-reentry && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli finalize-reentry && python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage 2)

tasks.label: Track Seeds (auto-detect)
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli track-seeds; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli track-seeds; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli track-seeds) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli track-seeds)

tasks.label: Clean Workspace
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli clean-workspace --target-stage ${input:cleanTargetStage}; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli clean-workspace --target-stage ${input:cleanTargetStage}; fi

tasks.label: Validate All Stages
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage all; else python3 -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage all; fi

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage all) else (python -m meta_compiler.cli validate-stage --stage all)

tasks.label: Run Scaffold Self-Tests
tasks.command: if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest workspace-artifacts/scaffolds/v1/tests/ -v; else python3 -m pytest workspace-artifacts/scaffolds/v1/tests/ -v; fi
